steps.title: Filter for spectroscopy
steps.content: The question asks for the earliest spectroscopy data, not the earliest data overall. The table lists spectroscopy from VISIR in 2006 and TEXES in 2007 and 2019; T-ReCS and LWS are imaging sources.

steps.title: Pick earliest spectroscopy
steps.content: A is spectroscopy but later than 2006. B is imaging, not spectroscopy. D is the earliest overall source but is also imaging. The remaining source is the earliest spectroscopy entry. The answer is C.
